hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; ext="${f##*.}"; if [ "$ext" = "go" ]; then gofmt -w "$f"; elif echo "$f" | grep -qE '^frontend/' && echo "$ext" | grep -qE '^(ts|tsx|css|json|md)$'; then npx --prefix frontend prettier --write "$f"; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true
